utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Thank you . Thank you so much !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Chandler , here you go , got your traditional Thanksgiving feast , you got your tomato soup , your grilled cheese fixin , and your family size bag of Funyuns .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Wait , wait , Chandler , this is what you are havin for Thanksgiving dinner ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_this is what you are havin for Thanksgiving dinner ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: What , what , what is it with you and this holiday ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_this is what you are havin for Thanksgiving dinner ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: All right , I am nine years old .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: We just finished this magnificent Thanksgiving dinner .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I have ... and I remember this part vividly ... a mouthful of pumpkin pie , and this is the moment my parents choose to tell me they are getting divorced .

emotion_cause.span: 10_this is the moment my parents choose to tell me they are getting divorced .
10_this is the moment my parents choose to tell me they are getting divorced .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yes . It is very difficult to appreciate a Thanksgiving dinner once you have seen it in reverse .

emotion_cause.span: 12_It is very difficult to appreciate a Thanksgiving dinner once you have seen it in reverse .
